semantic.$description: Dark theme: only colour tokens are overridden; non-colour semantics (typography, spacing, radius) remain identical across themes. Intentional v1 constraint.

surface-page.$description: Page background — deep navy in dark mode

surface-panel.$description: Panel/card background — slightly lighter than page

surface-accent.$description: Accent surface — fern green preserved from light theme

border-subtle.$description: Dividers and panel borders (≥3:1 on dark surfaces)

text-inverse.$description: Text on accent/light backgrounds — dark navy for contrast against sun/fern

accent-strong.$description: Hover/active accent — darker gold, distinct from accent for visible state change

error.$description: Error states on dark backgrounds (≥4.5:1 on ink surfaces)
